target_profile.thesis: Gaming + AI infrastructure, Web3 gaming, spatial computing

funds.geography: Global (Berlin, LA, SF, NYC, London, Singapore, Barcelona)

primary_contact.name: Jens Hilgers
primary_contact.title: Founding General Partner
primary_contact.background: Founded ESL (esports) 2000, Co-founded G2 Esports, widely considered 'godfather of esports'

thesis_fit.alignment: Perfect alignment - gaming + AI infrastructure + Web3 core to mandate

recent_investments.focus: Web3 infrastructure, Dojo engine for onchain games

funds.outreach_hook: Following BITKRAFT's thesis on 'Synthetic Reality' - the convergence of gaming, AI, and immersive tech. Your recent Cartridge/NPC Labs investments show conviction in AI-powered onchain infrastructure.
warm_intro_paths: Portfolio companies in AI gaming infrastructure

primary_contact.name: Jackson Vaughan
primary_contact.title: Managing Partner & Co-Founder
primary_contact.background: NYU Stern, previously Whim CEO, board member at Carry1st and StageZero

thesis_fit.alignment: Strong alignment - thesis explicitly covers AR/VR, crypto, esports, and gaming platforms

funds.outreach_hook: Konvoy's thesis on 'frontier of gaming' directly aligns with our AI infrastructure play. Your Edgegap investment shows conviction in AI-powered gaming backend infrastructure - exactly our space.

funds.geography: Global (SF-based, visa support for international founders)

primary_contact.name: Troy Kirwin
primary_contact.title: Partner & Cohort Lead
primary_contact.background: Ex-Unity, leads a16z speedrun cohorts, focuses on B2B AI and creative tech

thesis_fit.alignment: Very strong - explicitly invests at intersection of TECH x GAMES (AI/infra, 3D tools, VR/AR, web3 games)

portfolio_notables: Various AI x gaming infrastructure startups
funds.outreach_hook: a16z Speedrun's explicit mandate is 'TECH x GAMES' - AI/infra, 3D tools, VR/AR, web3 games. SR006 applications just opened - but we're raising now and fit your thesis perfectly.

primary_contact.name: David Lau-Kee
primary_contact.title: Co-Founder & General Partner
primary_contact.background: Founded Criterion Software (RenderWare engine, Burnout), early investor in Supercell and Unity, 25+ years gaming industry

thesis_fit.alignment: Strong - exclusively invests in gaming ecosystem including tech/platforms/infrastructure

funds.outreach_hook: LVP was early to Supercell and Unity - you understand gaming infrastructure before others. We're building the AI infrastructure layer that every game studio will need.
funds.trello_card_title: P4: London Venture Partners - David Lau-Kee

primary_contact.name: Tipatat Chennavasin
primary_contact.title: Co-Founder & General Partner
primary_contact.background: Stanford BS, created VR/AR content, became convinced of VR power after curing his fear of heights while developing in VR

thesis_fit.alignment: Good - specializes in AI & Spatial Computing, VR/AR, and immersive tech for gaming/enterprise

funds.outreach_hook: VRF's focus on 'AI & Spatial Computing' for immersive gaming aligns with our vision. Your Gracia AI investment shows conviction in AI-generated spatial content - our infrastructure enables exactly this.
